An announcement from Argo Investments Limited ( (AU:ARG) ) is now available.

Argo Investments Limited has announced key dates related to its financial year-end reporting, dividend distribution, and Annual General Meeting. The results announcement for the year ending June 30, 2025, is scheduled for August 4, 2025, with the dividend payment, pending board approval, slated for September 12, 2025. These announcements are crucial for stakeholders as they outline the timeline for financial disclosures and shareholder meetings, impacting investment decisions and corporate governance.

More about Argo Investments Limited

Argo Investments Limited is a company that operates in the financial sector, focusing on investment management. It provides shareholders with diversified investment portfolios, primarily in Australian equities, aiming to deliver long-term capital growth and dividend income.

data.title: Scorpion Minerals Commences Drilling at Pharos Gold Project
data.description:
Don’t Miss TipRanks’ Half-Year Sale

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.
  • Make smarter investment decisions with TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks, delivered to your inbox every week.

Scorpion Minerals Limited ( (AU:SCN) ) has issued an update.

Scorpion Minerals Limited has mobilized its drilling contractor and technical team to the Pharos Gold Project in the Murchison region of Western Australia, marking the commencement of a significant Reverse Circulation (RC) drilling program. This initiative aims to explore high-grade gold targets across several sites, including Oliver’s Patch, Cap Lamp, and Lantern, with the expectation of completing up to 1500 meters of drilling by late July. The company has also submitted approximately 1000 rock chip and RC samples for analysis, with results anticipated by mid-July. This drilling program is a strategic move to leverage Scorpion’s expansive landholding in the largely unexplored Dalgaranga–Big Bell shear corridor, potentially enhancing its market position and delivering exploration success for its stakeholders.

More about Scorpion Minerals Limited

Scorpion Minerals Limited is a company operating in the mining industry, primarily focusing on gold exploration and development. The company is actively engaged in exploring the Murchison region of Western Australia, particularly the Pharos Gold Project, which is part of the highly prospective Big Bell–Dalgaranga shear corridor.

Average Trading Volume: 683,255

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$8.38M

The latest update is out from Australian Wealth Advisors Group Ltd. ( (AU:WAG) ).

Australian Wealth Advisors Group Ltd. announced a change in the indirect interest of its director, Mark Stephen, involving an acquisition of 47,271 ordinary shares through an on-market trade. Block, Inc. Shs Chess Depository Interests Repr 1 Sh ( (AU:XYZ) ) just unveiled an update.

Block, Inc. has announced a change in the number of Chess Depository Interests (CDIs) issued over quoted securities, with a net decrease of 2,045,341 CDIs from the previous month. This change is attributed to net transfers of securities between CDIs and common stock as quoted on the NYSE. The company also reported changes in the number of Class A common stock due to transfers, issuances under the 2015 equity plan, and share repurchases, while the number of Class B common stock remained unchanged.

WestKam Gold ( (TSE:WKG) ) has issued an announcement.

WestKam Gold Corp. has announced a delay in filing its Q2 interim financial statements due to the medical leave of its CFO. The company has received a management cease trade order from the British Columbia Securities Commission, allowing the general public to continue trading its shares while restricting trading by its executives until the filings are completed, expected by the end of August 2025.

data.title: First Graphene Expands Hydrogen and Aerospace Ventures
data.description:
Don’t Miss TipRanks’ Half-Year Sale

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.
  • Make smarter investment decisions with TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks, delivered to your inbox every week.

First Graphene Ltd ( (AU:FGR) ) has provided an update.

First Graphene Limited is advancing its role in the A$3.72 million HyPStore project, aimed at developing lightweight cryogenic tanks for liquid hydrogen storage. The company is testing graphene-enhanced resin systems to improve tank impermeability, potentially reducing hydrogen permeability by up to 48 times. Additionally, First Graphene is collaborating with Imperial College London and University College London on a project to upscale chemically modified graphene for 3D printing of metals, supported by a A$1.2 million grant from Innovate UK. These initiatives are expected to enhance the company’s commercial pathways and industry positioning in hydrogen storage and aerospace applications.

More about First Graphene Ltd

First Graphene Limited is a company operating in the advanced materials industry, focusing on the development and commercialization of graphene-based products. The company is involved in various sectors, including hydrogen storage and aerospace, leveraging graphene’s unique properties to enhance product performance and sustainability.

IDP Education Ltd. ( (AU:IEL) ) has provided an update.

IDP Education Ltd. has experienced a change in the substantial holding of its voting shares, as JPMorgan Chase & Co. and its affiliates have increased their voting power from 5.48% to 7.05%. This change reflects a significant shift in the company’s shareholder structure, potentially impacting its market influence and decision-making processes. The increase in voting power is attributed to various transactions, including securities lending and purchases by different JPMorgan entities, highlighting the dynamic nature of financial holdings and their implications for stakeholders.
